title: Tender Notice - Invitation for Tenders Financial Year 2026
description: Invitation for 9 tenders including supply of office stationeries, laptops/desktops, preventive maintenance of power generators, courier services, branding services, and investigation services. All tenders are open with contracts taking effect between June-August 2026.
